# render-diff

Contributes a `PluginChanges.DiffRenderer` for the slots facet so PR review panes show added/removed slot definitions (`group.member`).

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Diff renderer for the slots facet (PR review).
- Web:
  - Contributes: `PluginChanges.DiffRenderer` "Slots"
